items.title: Robins — Senior Registration
items.description: First Team & Reserves players. Includes league registration, training and matchday fees for the 2025–26 season.

items.title: Bantams — Youth Registration
items.description: Youth team players (U7s–U16s). Covers coaching, league registration and kit contribution for the season.

items.title: Bantams — Girls Registration
items.description: Girls' section players. Covers coaching, league registration and kit contribution for the season.

items.title: Bantams — Ladies Registration
items.description: Ladies team players. Includes league registration, training and matchday fees for the 2025–26 season.
